mano_cua.result_summary: 核心板块导航(步骤1-5)正常：子板块跳转、返回、快速切换均OK无404。但设置页面(/settings)渲染空白，3次点击解锁机制不工作(计数器不递减)，从设置页返回后板块页永久白屏(ThemeProvider.render报TypeError:Cannot read fontFamily of undefined)。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The page is still blank at localhost:3000/board/root. The board is completely non-functional now in this tab. Tab 1 is now broken permanently by the ThemeProvider error. Core board navigation (steps 1-5) works correctly, but there are critical bugs in the settings system and a ThemeProvider crash that prevents the app from recovering after visiting the settings page. The settings page is completely non-functional (blank), and after visiting it, the board page breaks due to a TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading fontFamily) error in ThemeProvider.render.
